name: swift-agent-kit
description: Swift development kit for Claude Code: house Swift 6/SwiftUI standards, real Apple docs lookup (local SDK + DocC JSON), an empirically-built operating guide for Xcode 27's MCP server, and Apple's own Xcode 27 agent skills — extracted from YOUR Xcode by an install script (never redistributed), with a SessionStart hook that nudges until extraction has run.
